headline: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years
summary: Shares of Berkshire Hathaway have lost ground for eight consecutive days. It is their longest losing streak since December of 2018.

raw.headline: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years
